categories.name: Operating Systems
categories.description: Core OS kernels, drivers, and system-level infrastructure (e.g., Linux, Windows, macOS).

categories.name: Web Frameworks & Tools
categories.description: Frontend frameworks, build tools, UI libraries, and web development utilities (e.g., React, Vue, Vite, Bootstrap).

categories.name: Programming Languages
categories.description: Core language implementations, interpreters, compilers, and standard libraries (e.g., Python, C++, Rust).

categories.name: IDEs & Development Environments
categories.description: Integrated development environments, code editors, and tooling for software creation (e.g., VS Code, IntelliJ).

categories.name: Other
categories.description: Repositories that do not fit into the primary technical domains above.
